'''Doornik-628C''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Doornik-628 system|Doornik-628]] [[Star system/Legends|system]]. Its core was surrounded by [[Acid/Legends|acidic]] clouds, and it had no natural [[Satellite/Legends|satellites]].
